def negative_python_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_env_parsed_per_operation():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_env_parsed_per_operation"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag environment parsing and type conversion per operation instead of startup settings load."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
